title: 36 PCS Baby Shower Cake Toppers,Gold Oh Baby Cake Toppers for Kids Birthday Party Supplies,Boy or Girl Theme Cupcake Toppers,Baby Shower Cupcake Toppers
features: Special Design: These baby shower cake toppers are designed with "Oh Baby" letters, lovely and funny, decorating your cake perfectly, adding fun and joy for your party.
Effortless Elegance: Our baby shower cake topper achieves a polished and refined look effortlessly, providing a hassle-free way to make your desserts stand out at any celebratory event.
Premium Material: Our oh baby cake toppers are made of premium glitter paper, reliable, flash and safe, not easy to break or fade, you can use them with a confidence.
Package Content: The baby shower cake decorations are enough. You will receive 36 pieces of oh baby cupcake toppers, sufficient quantity to decorate your cake, pies, desserts, etc.

Wide Usages: The baby shower cupcake toppers can be used on birthday, baby shower, gender reveal party, also can be as a perfect photo props. Also perfect for fruit pie, ice cream, snack platter, etc.
